use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::sync::Arc;

struct AppState {
    cache: Arc<HashMap<String, CachedEntry>>,
    config: Arc<Config>,
    metrics: Arc<Metrics>,
}

struct CachedEntry {
    data: Vec<u8>,
    timestamp: u64,
}

struct Config {
    timeout: u64,
    max_retries: u32,
}

struct Metrics {
    hits: u64,
    misses: u64,
}

fn process_batch(state: &AppState, keys: &[String]) -> Vec<Vec<u8>> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for key in keys {
        if let Some(entry) = state.cache.get(key) {
            results.push(entry.data.clone());
        }
    }
    results
}
